description:
Monitor CheckMK hosts and services on the go
Unofficial CheckMK Monitoring is a Flutter-based app that connects to your CheckMK monitoring server.

It lets you view the current status of hosts and services, review recent events, and receive notifications when states change.

Key features:
- Dashboard overview of hosts and services
- Event console for recent service events
- Notifications and background monitoring
- Optional Android home screen widget
- Light and dark theme support

Requirements:
- A CheckMK Raw Edition (CRE) or Enterprise Edition (CEE) server
